meta.name: MagnetaServiceFee — accept ownership (arbitrum)
meta.description: Second leg of Ownable2Step: Safe 0x4AeA3A398Db41b45e146c08131aD27c75b02EC2F accepts ownership of MagnetaServiceFee 0xD1dd5a40089Ce8F607e623C4338544Dda3e13Da7 on arbitrum. Run AFTER deployServiceFee.ts (transferOwnership already done by deployer). Fees are OFF (opFee=0) until a later setOpFee.
